metadata.description: Engineering guidelines and best practices for software development

plugins.name: api
plugins.description: RESTful API design guidelines — URL structure, HTTP methods, status codes, JSON format, error responses, versioning, headers, and non-CRUD action endpoints

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Documentation decision records — ADR (Nygard format) and MADR (MADR 4.0) for architecture decisions

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow skills — safe commit, PR creation, PR review, squash merge, issue creation, full PR lifecycle orchestration, and worktree cleanup

plugins.name: workflow
plugins.description: Workflow skills — multi-LLM cross-check with Gemini for planning and execution

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Development methodology skills — Tidy First, TDD, and language-agnostic development practices
